nasb.text: Then Cain went out from the presence of the Lord, and settled in the land of Nod, east of Eden.

esv.text: Then Cain went away from the presence of the Lord and settled in the land of Nod, east of Eden.

cnv.text: 於是該隱從耶和華面前出去，住在伊甸東邊的挪得地。

ccb.text: 该隐离开耶和华，来到伊甸东边的挪得住下来。

csbs.text: 于是该隐从耶和华面前出去，住在伊甸东边的挪德地。
